holdings.n: Deposits With Broker For Short Positions

overview.description: The Innovator 1 Yr March (ZMAR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund seeks to track the return of the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (SPY), to a cap, with 100% downside hedge over a one-year outcome period. The actively managed fund holds FLEX options to obtain exposure ZMAR was launched on Feb 28, 2025 and is issued by Innovator.
